uxp.agent.chat_conductor_hint: Describe an edit in plain language. The conductor turns it into a step-by-step plan you can review before any work runs.

uxp.agent.intent_placeholder: e.g. Cut silences then add captions in Spanish
uxp.agent.mcp_bridge_hint: UXP-native bridge to the MCP tool catalogue. 39 curated tools plus 1,325 opt-in extended tools.
uxp.agent.one_click_enhance_hint: Loudness, denoise, stabilize, deflicker, and grade in one pass. Pick a style - Social, Speech, or Cinematic.
uxp.agent.sequence_index_hint: Spreadsheet-style read of the active Premiere sequence - clip name, timecode, duration, effects, ratings, transcript excerpts. Sort and filter without re-walking the timeline.
uxp.agent.shorts_ab_variants_hint: Render 2-6 short-form variants of the same window with different hook tightness, caption style, and focal point. A/B test before posting.

uxp.captions.chapters_intro: Draft platform-ready chapter markers from the current transcript flow, then copy the list into publishing or review notes.

uxp.captions.plan_note_default: Word timing is on. Speaker splits are off.
uxp.captions.repeat_intro: Flag duplicated lines and alternate takes before you commit to the next cleanup pass.

uxp.captions.runtime.waiting_on_backend_: Reconnect the local OpenCut backend to generate transcript output.
uxp.captions.transcribe_intro: Create a clean transcript first, then reuse the same review surface for chapters, repeat cleanup, and subtitle delivery.
uxp.cut.clip_path_placeholder: Paste a clip path or browse media...
uxp.fcc.compliance_notice_suffix: ), users must be able to readily access caption display controls. Pick a preset or override individual tokens.
uxp.fcc.defaults_loaded: Defaults loaded. Adjust tokens then Preview.
uxp.fcc.preview_sample_text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
uxp.fcc.preview_updated: Preview updated. These are the FCC display tokens applied to burn-in.
uxp.fcc.reset_defaults_status: Reset to FCC defaults. Click Preview to re-render.
uxp.fcc.schema_unavailable: Could not load FCC token schema. The card will stay empty.
uxp.guide.agent_text: Use the conductor, one-click enhance, variants, sequence index, and MCP bridge from one tab.
uxp.guide.agent_title: Plan and run assisted edit workflows.
uxp.guide.audio_text: Start with denoise or normalization, then add rhythm markers if the cut needs to lock to music.
uxp.guide.audio_title: Clean the voice bed before the rest of the finish.
uxp.guide.backend_offline_text: Run Start-OpenCut.bat (from the installer) or open a terminal and run: python -m opencut.server. Keep the terminal open while using the panel. The Live Updates Bridge in Settings is optional and not required for the panel to work.
uxp.guide.backend_offline_title: Start the OpenCut backend to begin processing.
uxp.guide.captions_text: Transcribe first, then move into chapters, repeat detection, or timeline import once the wording looks right.
uxp.guide.captions_title: Turn the active shot into reviewable text.
uxp.guide.choose_media_text: OpenCut keeps the current clip in sync across Cut, Captions, Audio, and Video so you can move through the edit without repeated setup.
uxp.guide.choose_media_title: Choose one active shot to unlock this workspace.
uxp.guide.cut_text: Start with silence detection or filler cleanup, then review the suggested cut ranges before writing them back to the timeline.
uxp.guide.cut_title: Build a cleaner first pass of the edit.
uxp.guide.deliverables_text: Load the active Premiere sequence, choose an output folder, and generate reports with cleaner defaults.
uxp.guide.deliverables_title: Pull sequence context before generating delivery docs.
uxp.guide.search_text: Index a folder once, search with natural language, and pull the matching shot back into the rest of the workspace.
uxp.guide.search_title: Search the library, then reuse the result instantly.
uxp.guide.settings_text: Refresh engine availability, verify the bridge, and make sure the panel is connected to the right backend.
uxp.guide.settings_title: Keep routing, engines, and live services healthy.
uxp.guide.timeline_text: Apply the latest cuts or markers, then export OTIO, markers, or captions from the same review session.
uxp.guide.timeline_title: Send approved changes back into Premiere with less friction.
uxp.guide.video_text: Use color, reframe, multicam, and short-form tools without repatching the same clip every time.
uxp.guide.video_title: Shape the frame and build derivative edits from one source.
uxp.guide.writeback_ready_text: Run a cleanup or beat pass in Cut or Audio, then return here to apply the result, export OTIO, or batch markers.
uxp.guide.writeback_ready_title: Generate cuts or markers first, then bring them back to the sequence.
uxp.status.backend_offline: OpenCut backend offline. Start the local service to run jobs.
uxp.status.backend_offline_action_title: Start or reconnect the OpenCut backend before running this action.
uxp.status.job_running_action_title: Another OpenCut job is running. Wait for it to finish or cancel it first.
uxp.status.update_available: OpenCut v{version} available - visit GitHub to update
uxp.timeline.apply_cuts_hint: Use the latest cut pass from Cut or Video and send it into the active Premiere sequence when the edit is ready.
uxp.timeline.batch_export_hint: Export beat-marked or cut-defined segments from the current clip once the output folder is set.
uxp.timeline.batch_rename_hint: Project-wide rename still runs through the CEP panel today. Keep the pattern here as a reference, then switch panels to execute safely.
uxp.timeline.beat_markers_hint: Adds beat markers from the last Beat Detection run to the active sequence timeline.
uxp.timeline.otio_export_hint: Export cuts or markers as .otio for DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, Avid, or any OTIO-compatible editor.
uxp.timeline.otio_accept_lossy: Allow a downgrade after reviewing reported data loss
uxp.timeline.preview_notice: Direct UXP sequence write-back is still in preview. Some timeline tasks hand off to the CEP panel for dependable execution.
uxp.timeline.smart_bins_hint: Smart bin execution also still lives in the CEP panel. Use this strategy picker as a planning reference before switching panels.
uxp.timeline.srt_prep_hint: Check the file and count caption segments here, then place them through the CEP ocAddNativeCaptionTrack bridge action until UXP caption writes are live-tested.
uxp.timeline.status_line: Generate cuts or beat markers first, then return here to write back, export OTIO, or validate captions for sequence import.
uxp.timeline.runtime.uxp_writeback_avail: UXP sequence write-back is available in this Premiere session.
uxp.timeline.runtime.direct_write_unavai: Direct sequence write-back is not available here. Use the CEP panel for dependable timeline execution.
uxp.timeline.runtime.stage_cuts_title: Run silence, filler, or multicam cleanup to stage cuts for timeline write-back.
uxp.timeline.runtime.stage_markers_title: Run beat detection to stage markers for sequence write-back or marker-based export.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_timeline_activit: No timeline write-back, export, or validation action has run in this session.
uxp.timeline.runtime.uxp_bridge_ready_ti: The UXP bridge is ready. Direct sequence calls will use the active sequence when available.
uxp.timeline.runtime.export_windows_stag: {count} export window is staged from the latest {source} pass.
{count} export windows are staged from the latest {source} pass.
uxp.timeline.runtime.stage_export_window: Run beat detection or create cuts first, then export those windows from the current clip.
uxp.timeline.runtime.choose_export_desti: Choose an export destination for marker-based segments.
uxp.timeline.runtime.batch_rename_cep_ti: Batch rename still executes through the CEP panel on this build.
uxp.timeline.runtime.smart_bins_cep_titl: Smart bin execution still runs through the CEP panel on this build.
uxp.timeline.runtime.choose_srt_file_tit: Choose an .srt file to validate before the CEP ocAddNativeCaptionTrack bridge places it.
uxp.timeline.runtime.target_track_title: Track {index} target for the CEP ocAddNativeCaptionTrack handoff.
uxp.timeline.runtime.backend_reconnect_t: Reconnect the local backend before exporting windows, validating captions, or packaging timeline handoff.
uxp.timeline.runtime.assets_ready_cep_st: Timeline assets are ready, but direct sequence write-back still needs the CEP panel on this Premiere setup. OTIO export and SRT validation remain available here.
uxp.timeline.runtime.generate_assets_cep: Generate cuts or beat markers first. Direct sequence write-back will fall back to the CEP panel on this setup.
uxp.timeline.runtime.assets_ready_action: Timeline assets are ready. Apply cuts, add markers, export OTIO, or validate an SRT before the handoff pass.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_cuts_to_apply: No cuts to apply. Run silence removal or filler detection first.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_cuts_staged_deta: No cuts are staged for sequence write-back yet. Run silence, filler, or multicam cleanup first.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_cuts_staged_shor: No cuts are staged for sequence write-back yet.
uxp.timeline.runtime.applying_cuts_uxp: Applying cuts to timeline via UXP...
uxp.timeline.runtime.applied_cuts_detail: Applied {count} cut(s) to the active sequence.
uxp.timeline.runtime.timeline_write_fail: UXP timeline write failed: {reason}. Use CEP panel for Premiere < 25.6.
Timeline write failed - see CEP panel.
uxp.timeline.runtime.direct_write_failed: Direct UXP write-back failed. {reason}. Use the CEP panel for this sequence pass.
uxp.timeline.runtime.timeline_api_previe: Connect via CEP panel for timeline operations (UXP timeline API in preview).
uxp.timeline.runtime.timeline_api_unavai: UXP timeline API unavailable - use CEP panel.
uxp.timeline.runtime.direct_write_unavai: Direct sequence write-back is not available in this UXP session. Use the CEP panel for timeline operations.
Direct sequence write-back is not available in this UXP session.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_markers_to_add: No markers to add. Run beat detection first.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_markers_staged_d: No markers are staged for sequence write-back yet. Run beat detection first.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_markers_staged_s: No markers are staged for sequence write-back yet.
uxp.timeline.runtime.adding_markers_uxp: Adding markers to sequence via UXP...
uxp.timeline.runtime.added_markers_detai: Added {count} marker(s) to the active sequence.
uxp.timeline.runtime.marker_insertion_fa: UXP marker insertion failed: {reason}. Use CEP panel as fallback.
Marker insertion failed in UXP. {reason}. Use the CEP panel as fallback.
uxp.timeline.runtime.marker_write_unavai: Marker insertion is not available in this UXP session. Use the CEP panel for timeline operations.
Marker insertion is not available in this UXP session.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_markers_or_cuts_: No markers or cuts to export. Run beat detection or silence removal first.
uxp.timeline.runtime.marker_export_compl: Marker-based export finished with {count} segment(s) in {outputDir}.
uxp.timeline.runtime.batch_rename_cep: Batch rename still runs through the CEP panel in this build.
uxp.timeline.runtime.rename_via_cep_deta: Batch rename is planned from this workspace, but execution still lives in the CEP panel today.
uxp.timeline.runtime.smart_bins_cep: Smart bins still execute through the CEP panel in this build.
uxp.timeline.runtime.smart_bins_via_cep_: Smart bin rules can be planned here, but execution still lives in the CEP panel today.
uxp.timeline.runtime.srt_validation_read: SRT validation is ready. Use the CEP ocAddNativeCaptionTrack bridge action to place {count} caption segment(s) on track {trackIndex}.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_cuts_available: No cuts available. Run silence removal first.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_markers_availabl: No markers available. Run beat detection first.
uxp.timeline.runtime.otio_export_ready_d: OTIO export is ready for Resolve, Final Cut, Avid, or any OTIO-compatible tool.
uxp.video.broll_analysis_hint: Analyze transcript to find natural B-roll insertion windows and keywords.
uxp.video.chat_hint: Chat with OpenCut's AI to edit your video using natural language.
uxp.video.chat_placeholder: e.g. "Remove all silences and normalize audio"
uxp.video.emotion_hint: Detect emotional peaks in video (happy, surprise, etc.) for automatic highlight extraction.
uxp.video.shorts_pipeline_hint: Transcribe, detect highlights, face-reframe, burn captions, and export short-form clips in one step.
uxp.video.title: Title
uxp.video.runtime.select_input_reference: Please select both input and reference clips.
uxp.video.runtime.opening_platform_autho: Opening {platform} authorization page in your browser
Opening {platform} authorization page in your browser.
uxp.video.runtime.oauth_not_configured_p: OAuth not configured for {platform}. Set API credentials.
uxp.video.runtime.emotion_analysis_compl: Emotion analysis complete: {count} emotional peak(s) found.
uxp.video.runtime.broll_analysis_complet: B-roll analysis complete: {count} insertion point(s) found.
uxp.video.runtime.shorts_render_state_ca: Render state: {count} approved candidate(s) will be sent to /video/shorts-pipeline.
uxp.video.runtime.shorts_plan_state_appr: Plan state: approve at least one candidate before rendering.
uxp.video.runtime.shorts_analyze_state_r: Analyze state: cached transcript or highlight data is required before review.
uxp.video.runtime.shorts_plan_state_cand: Plan state: {count} candidate(s) ready for approval.
uxp.video.runtime.shorts_no_candidate_wi: No candidate windows are available yet.
uxp.video.runtime.shorts_plan_building_b: Plan state: building candidate review board.
uxp.video.runtime.shorts_approve_candida: Approve at least one Magic Clips candidate first.
uxp.workspace.agent_subtitle: Plan, enhance, index, and bridge assisted edit workflows from one workspace.
uxp.workspace.audio_subtitle: Denoise, normalize, loudness-match, and cut to rhythm from one focused surface.
uxp.workspace.captions_subtitle: Transcribe, structure, and style subtitles without leaving the panel.
uxp.workspace.choose_source_title: Choose a clip or paste a path to start
uxp.workspace.cut_subtitle: Trim dead space, fillers, and rough pacing with a tighter review flow.
uxp.workspace.deliverables_subtitle: Review sequence context and export reports, documents, and final handoff assets.
uxp.workspace.search_subtitle: Index the library, search footage, and trigger edit actions from natural-language commands.
uxp.workspace.settings_subtitle: Tune engine routing, realtime connections, and shared defaults.
uxp.workspace.timeline_subtitle: Write changes back into Premiere, export interchange, and run batch production tasks with confidence.
uxp.workspace.video_subtitle: Shape the image, plan coverage, and build short-form versions with a cleaner finishing toolkit.
uxp.timeline.runtime.bins_applied_detail: Created {done} of {total} bin(s) using the {strategy} strategy.
uxp.timeline.runtime.bins_needs_uxp: Smart bins need the UXP host bridge; this Premiere build routes it through the CEP panel.
uxp.timeline.runtime.bins_no_rules: No bins to create for that strategy.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_items_for_bins: No project items available to organize.
uxp.timeline.runtime.no_items_to_rename: No project items available to rename.
uxp.timeline.runtime.rename_applied_deta: Renamed {done} of {total} project item(s). An inverse rename is available via the button.
uxp.timeline.runtime.rename_bins_need_ux: Available on Premiere builds with the UXP host bridge; this build routes it through the CEP panel.
uxp.timeline.runtime.rename_needs_uxp: Batch rename needs the UXP host bridge; this Premiere build routes it through the CEP panel.
uxp.timeline.runtime.rename_partial: Renamed {done} of {total} item(s); click to undo.
uxp.timeline.runtime.rename_preview: Preview: {count} item(s) will be renamed, e.g. {example}. Click again to apply.
uxp.journal.auto_restore_count_title: {count} checkpoint(s) have a verified UXP inverse.
uxp.journal.cep_restore_required: Open the CEP panel to restore this checkpoint.
uxp.journal.checking_hint: Loading durable checkpoints and saved inverse plans...
uxp.journal.checkpoint_failed: Could not create a recovery checkpoint: {error}. No Premiere changes were made.
uxp.journal.completion_failed: Premiere changed, but the recovery checkpoint could not be completed. It remains available for review.
uxp.journal.recovery_clear: No interrupted host writes. Every checkpoint reached completion.
uxp.journal.recovery_clear_hint: No incomplete host-write transactions were found.
uxp.journal.recovery_hint: Review host writes that began but did not record completion after a panel or Premiere restart.
uxp.journal.recovery_payload_failed: Could not verify the saved recovery payload.
uxp.journal.recovery_unavailable: Recovery checkpoints could not be loaded.
uxp.journal.recovery_unavailable_hint: Reconnect the local backend, then refresh recovery.
uxp.journal.restore_mark_failed: Premiere was restored, but the checkpoint state could not be updated.
uxp.journal.restore_markers_missing: No matching markers were found in the active sequence ({count} expected), so nothing was restored.
